sample_requests: Convert this OmicVerse preprocessing notebook into a reusable skill
Run the OmicVerse single-cell preprocessing and marker workflow on a tiny synthetic AnnData object

smoke_commands.name: cpu-pipeline-wilcoxon
smoke_commands.command:
${PYTHON} -u - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import anndata as ad
import omicverse as ov

if hasattr(ov.settings, 'cpu_init'):
    ov.settings.cpu_init()

rng = np.random.default_rng(0)
X = rng.poisson(lam=4, size=(60, 40)).astype(float)
X[:30, :5] += 25
X[30:, 5:10] += 25
var_names = [f'G{i}' for i in range(40)]
var_names[0] = 'MT-1'
var_names[1] = 'MT-2'
adata = ad.AnnData(X=X, obs=pd.DataFrame(index=[f'cell{i}' for i in range(60)]), var=pd.DataFrame(index=var_names))
adata.var_names_make_unique()
adata.obs_names_make_unique()

qc_status = None
try:
    q = ov.pp.qc(adata.copy(), mode='mads', doublets=False, min_genes=0, min_cells=0)
    qc_status = {'ok': True, 'shape': list(q.shape)}
except Exception as exc:
    qc_status = {'ok': False, 'error': f'{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}'}

adata = ov.pp.preprocess(adata, mode='shiftlog|pearson', n_HVGs=20, target_sum=1e4, identify_robust=False)
adata.raw = adata
adata = adata[:, adata.var.highly_variable_features].copy()
ov.pp.scale(adata)
ov.pp.pca(adata, layer='scaled', n_pcs=10)
ov.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=10, n_pcs=10, use_rep='scaled|original|X_pca', method='umap')
ov.pp.umap(adata)
ov.pp.leiden(adata, resolution=0.5)
ov.single.find_markers(adata, groupby='leiden', method='wilcoxon', n_genes=5, key_added='rank_genes_groups', pts=True)
markers = ov.single.get_markers(adata, n_genes=5, key='rank_genes_groups', return_type='dict')

summary = {
    'mode': ov.settings.mode,
    'qc': qc_status,
    'layers': sorted(list(adata.layers.keys())),
    'obs_keys': sorted([k for k in adata.obs_keys() if k in {'leiden'}]),
    'obsm_keys': sorted([k for k in adata.obsm_keys() if k in {'scaled|original|X_pca', 'X_umap'}]),
    'marker_groups': sorted(markers.keys()),
    'first_group_count': len(next(iter(markers.values()))) if markers else 0,
}
print(json.dumps(summary, sort_keys=True))
PY

smoke_commands.name: cosg-marker-dotplot
smoke_commands.command:
${PYTHON} -u - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import anndata as ad
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import omicverse as ov

if hasattr(ov.settings, 'cpu_init'):
    ov.settings.cpu_init()

rng = np.random.default_rng(1)
X = rng.poisson(lam=4, size=(48, 24)).astype(float)
X[:24, :4] += 30
X[24:, 4:8] += 30
adata = ad.AnnData(X=X, obs=pd.DataFrame(index=[f'cell{i}' for i in range(48)]), var=pd.DataFrame(index=[f'G{i}' for i in range(24)]))
adata.var_names_make_unique()
adata = ov.pp.preprocess(adata, mode='shiftlog|pearson', n_HVGs=12, target_sum=1e4, identify_robust=False)
adata.raw = adata
adata = adata[:, adata.var.highly_variable_features].copy()
ov.pp.scale(adata)
ov.pp.pca(adata, layer='scaled', n_pcs=8)
ov.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=8, n_pcs=8, use_rep='scaled|original|X_pca')
ov.pp.leiden(adata, resolution=0.5)
ov.single.find_markers(adata, groupby='leiden', method='cosg', n_genes=4, key_added='cosg_markers', pts=True)
df = ov.single.get_markers(adata, n_genes=4, key='cosg_markers', return_type='dataframe')
ax = ov.pl.markers_dotplot(adata, groupby='leiden', key='cosg_markers', n_genes=4, show=False)
plt.close('all')
print(json.dumps({'rows': int(df.shape[0]), 'groups': sorted(df['group'].astype(str).unique().tolist()), 'ax_type': type(ax).__name__}, sort_keys=True))
PY
